name: openEuler Programming-language SIG
description: Language components running in the development environment of openEuler

name: openEuler Programming-language SIG Repository List
description: openEuler Programming-language SIG maintains 372 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Programming-language SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for Language components running in the development environment of openEuler. The SIG has 15 core members and maintains 372 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Programming-language SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Programming-language SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Programming-language SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Programming-language SIG maintains 372 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Programming-language.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Programming-language SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Programming-language SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: Luo Shengwei, Yongqiang Li. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
